project.name: accessible_reader
project.description: Browser-first local-first Recall workspace for Windows 11 with a primary web UI, a real Microsoft Edge browser companion extension, a WSL-hosted toolchain, and opt-in AI only for Simplify and Summary.

notes: This phase 2B profile reflects a browser-first Recall workspace with a supported Edge browser companion extension.
The app is operated through a WSL-hosted toolchain, but real browser validation stays Windows Edge-first.
AI remains opt-in only for Simplify and Summary, and the extension stays context-only rather than current-tab import.
